title: rubus carpinetorum
intro: Rubus carpinetorum, also known as the Strawberry tree or the Thimbleberry, is a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is primarily found in the Mediterranean region and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus carpinetorum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
